_comment: Bipolar UK peer support groups. Replace the example entry below with real groups from https://www.bipolaruk.org/find-a-support-group . Schema: name (string), region (string, used to group entries in the UI), format ('in-person' | 'online' | 'hybrid'), when (string, free-form schedule), location (string, address or 'Online'), contactName (string, optional), contactEmail (string, optional), contactPhone (string, optional), link (string, optional URL to Bipolar UK page or group page), notes (string, optional).

groups.name: Example Group — replace with real data
groups.location: Example Community Centre, 1 Example Street, London EC1A 1AA
groups.notes: Placeholder entry showing the expected shape. Delete this object once real groups are added.
